CREATE TABLE bpel_process_instance (id INT PRIMARY KEY, status VARCHAR(20));
SELECT * FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status IN (SELECT status FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE id = 3);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status = 'waiting');
BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete((SELECT id FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 1));
BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete((SELECT MAX(id) FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status = 'running'));
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM bpel_process_instance GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete(SELECT id FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status = 'running' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete((SELECT id FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2)));
BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete((SELECT id FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status = 'waiting' AND id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM bpel_process_instance)));
BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete((SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM bpel_process_instance WHERE status = 'completed') AS subquery));
